leadText: The Shock Drive (Japanese: イナズマカセット Lightning Cassette) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V. It is one of the Drives, which are associated with Genesect. It corresponds to the Electric type.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If the holder uses Techno Blast , it becomes an Electric-type move . Changes a Genesect holding this item to its Shock Drive form . Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Genesect a Drive or remove a Drive from Genesect. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Changes a Genesect holding this item to its Shock Drive form .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If the holder uses Techno Blast , it becomes an Electric-type move . Changes a Genesect holding this item to its Shock Drive form . Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Genesect a Drive or remove a Drive from Genesect.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B P2 Laboratory (show Genesect to Scientist Dudley) B2 P2 Laboratory (show Genesect to Scientist Dudley) X Y Ambrette Town Fossil Lab (show Genesect to a Hiker ) OR AS Mauville City (show Genesect to a Street Thug ) S M US UM Route 8 (from Colress after becoming Champion ) Sw Sh Stow-on-Side (from the bargain shop keeper, if the player owns a Genesect ) ZA MD Vert Sector 7 (540 Mega Shards , after initiating Side Mission 191: "Collecting Four Drives" )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Techno Blast to an Electric-type move. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Electric type.
